title: rubus × oligocarpus
intro: Rubus × oligocarpus, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a plant species resulting from the cross-breeding of Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus × oligocarpus include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Rubus × oligocarpus can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being.
